reviews.review_description: As a middle aged man who likes a bit of a boogie I thought I'd check this out.  To begin with, it's pretty clear I'm not the target audience for this game.  Each round consists of 5 minutes of dress up, for 30 seconds of dance battle, meaning the emphasis is really (currently) on the dressing up, rather than the dancing.  Mechanically it appears to work well enough (though there were no others playing when I tried it, so i had to dance alone (cry me a river).  This game is obviously aimed at teenage girls, which is fair enough.  That said, if devs were to cut back on the dress-up, and focus more on the dance battles, I could potentially see this being more widely appealing.   The concept and execution isn't bad, but if you're not a teenage girl, this probably isn't for you...
